publishedAbstract: In IPv6 ODF Clusters NooBaa may enter a state of Configuring/Connecting. In some instances, Metal Load Balancer `metallb-operator` may be a contributing factor to the issue as well. This affects all ODF Clusters v4.15 and below. ~~~ status: conditions:- lastHeartbeatTime: "2024-06-04T05:28:30Z" lastTransitionTime: "2024-05-21T14:57:52Z" message: Invalid URL reason: TemporaryError status: "False" type: Available- lastHeartbeatTime: "2024-06-04T05:28:30Z" lastTransitionTime: "2024-05-21T14:57:52Z" message: Invalid URL reason: TemporaryError status: "True" type: Progressing- lastHeartbeatTime: "2024-06-03T10:45:49Z" lastTransitionTime: "2024-05-21T14:57:52Z" message: 'RPC: connection (0xc002812360) already closed ReconnectDelay:3s cancelPings:}' reason: TemporaryError status: "False" type: Available- lastHeartbeatTime: "2024-06-03T10:45:49Z" phase: Connecting kind: BackingStoreList ~~~
publishedTitle: NooBaa Stuck in Phase "Configuring" or "Connecting" with  "Invalid URL" IPv6 Clusters
